article.title: Tim Cook’s top Apple acquisitions mix hardware, software, and services
article.summary: Tim Cook’s Apple may have passed on buying Tesla, but the company sure has an interesting list of smaller companies it bought during the outgoing CEO’s tenure. Let’s stroll down Mergers and Acquisitions memory lane and revisit some of the top company takeovers during Tim Cook’s time at the top. more…
article.title_zh: Tim Cook 最重要的 Apple 收購混合硬件、軟件和服務
article.summary_zh: 雖然 Tim Cook 的 Apple 沒有收購 Tesla，但該公司在掌舵期間收購了許多小公司。讓我們回顧 Tim Cook 時代的一些重要收購案例。

article.title: More on Apple’s Logically Elegant Tariff Refund Puzzle Solution
article.title_zh: 更多關於 Apple 邏輯優雅的關稅退款謎題解決方案

article.title: Tim Cook’s Clever Solution to the Tariff Refund Puzzle
article.title_zh: Tim Cook 的關稅退款謎題聰慧解決方案

article.title: The Next Alzheimer’s Breakthrough Will Take More Than Just Science
article.summary: At WIRED Health, pioneering Alzheimer's researcher John Hardy outlined the stakes—and next steps—of where treatment is headed next.
article.title_zh: 下一個阿茲海默症突破將需要不止於科學
article.summary_zh: 在 WIRED Health 大會上，開創性的阿茲海默症研究人員 John Hardy 概述了治療下一步發展的關鍵所在。

article.title: Senators ban themselves from prediction markets after candidates bet on own races
article.summary: US senators voted unanimously to ban themselves from making bets on prediction markets yesterday, about a week after Kalshi said it caught three congressional candidates betting on their own campaigns. The resolution to prohibit senators from trading on prediction markets passed yesterday by unanimous consent. The action amends the Senate's conflict-of-interest rules and does not require approval by the House of Representatives. The House has a pending resolution that would impose a similar rule on its own members. “United States Senators have no business engaging in speculative activities like prediction markets while collecting a taxpayer-funded paycheck, period,” said Sen. Bernie Moreno (R-Ohio), who introduced the resolution. “Serving in Congress should never be about finding new ways
article.title_zh: 參議員投票禁止自己參與預測市場後發現候選人對自己競選賭注
article.summary_zh: 美國參議員昨日全票通過決議禁止自己在預測市場中進行交易，此舉發生在 Kalshi 發現三名國會候選人對自己的競選投注一週後。

article.title: Minnesota passes ban on fake AI nudes; app makers risk $500K fines
article.summary: This week, Minnesota became the first state to pass a law banning nudification apps that make it easy to "undress" or sexualize images of real people. Under the law , developers of websites, apps, software, or other services designed to "nudify" images risk extensive damages, including punitive damages, if a victim decides to sue. Their offending products could also be blocked in the state. Additionally, Minnesota's attorney general could impose fines up to $500,000 per fake AI nude flagged. Any fines collected would be used to fund services for victims of "sexual assault, general crime, domestic violence, and child abuse," the law stipulates. On Wednesday, the Minnesota Senate unanimously voted 65–0 to pass the law. That vote came after the bill just as quickly passed in the House last we
article.title_zh: 明尼蘇達州禁止假 AI 裸照；應用開發者面臨 50 萬美元罰款
article.summary_zh: 本週明尼蘇達州成為首個禁止裸露應用的州，該應用可輕易將真人影像「脫衣」或性化；開發者面臨廣泛損害賠償，包括懲罰性賠償。

article.title: Chinese court rules companies can't fire workers just because AI is cheaper — ruling says automation alone doesn't justify layoffs
article.summary: Chinese courts ruled that companies cannot automatically fire workers simply because AI can do the job more cheaply, declaring that automation alone does not justify dismissal under labor law.
article.title_zh: 中國法院裁定公司不能因 AI 更便宜而開除員工 — 裁決表示自動化本身不足以成為裁員理由
article.summary_zh: 中國法院裁定公司不能僅因 AI 可更便宜地完成工作就自動開除員工，宣稱自動化本身在勞動法下不足以正當化解僱。

article.title: Google explains why Android AICore occasionally takes up more storage
article.summary: Android AICore lets you “run generative AI features directly on your Android phone or tablet’s hardware.” These models ( Gemini Nano ) are inherently large, but Google now has a more detailed explanation of why Android AICore storage occasionally spikes. more…
article.title_zh: Google 解釋為何 Android AICore 偶爾會佔用更多存儲空間
article.summary_zh: Android AICore 可讓用戶直接在 Android 手機或平板電腦硬件上運行生成式 AI 功能。Google 現已詳細解釋了 Android AICore 存儲偶爾激增的原因。

article.title: Anthropic in early talks to buy DRAM-less AI inference chips from UK startup — Fractile's SRAM architecture reduces need for pricey memory during extreme pricing and shortage crunch
article.summary: Anthropic has reportedly held early discussions with London-based chip startup Fractile about purchasing the company's inference accelerators.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 在早期洽談向英國新創購買無 DRAM AI 推論晶片 — Fractile 的 SRAM 架構在極端價格和短缺危機期間降低昂貴記憶體的需求
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 據報已與倫敦晶片新創公司 Fractile 進行早期討論，商談購買其推論加速器。

article.title: 對抗先進AI模型帶來的資安威脅態勢急速惡化，AI紅隊平臺新創廠商Armadin與兩大資安公司宣布合作
article.summary: 因成立資安公司Mandiant而聞名的Kevin Mandia，去年創辦新的資安公司Armadin專攻AI紅隊演練應用需求，提供AI代理驅動的攻擊型資安平臺（offensive platform），4月30日宣布與CrowdStrike、Palo Alto Networks這兩家資安大廠合作，他們正好是AI模型大廠Anthropic資安計畫Project G
article.title_zh: 對抗先進AI模型帶來的資安威脅態勢急速惡化，AI紅隊平臺新創廠商Armadin與兩大資安公司宣布合作
article.summary_zh: 因成立資安公司Mandiant而聞名的Kevin Mandia，去年創辦新的資安公司Armadin專攻AI紅隊演練應用需求，提供AI代理驅動的攻擊型資安平臺（offensive platform），4月30日宣布與CrowdStrike、Palo Alto Networks這兩家資安大廠合作，他們正好是AI模型大廠Anthropic資安計畫Project G

article.title: US Navy signs deal with AI firm for training underwater drones to detect mines in Strait of Hormuz — $100 million would allow drone minesweepers to update their detection algorithms in days instead of months
article.summary: The U.S. Navy just signed a $99.7 million deal with Domino Data Lab to build software to monitor other AI mine detection systems, identify failures, and push corrections in the field.
article.title_zh: 美國海軍與AI公司簽署協議培訓水下無人機探測霍爾木茲海峽地雷——1億美元將使無人機掃雷艇在數天內而非數月內更新檢測算法
article.summary_zh: 美國海軍與Domino Data Lab簽署了9,970萬美元的協議，開發軟體以監控其他AI地雷探測系統、識別故障並在現場推送更正。

article.title: This must-have miniature Macintosh retro dock gives your M4 Mac Mini a 1980s makeover — equipped with a 5-inch HD display and M.2 NVMe SSD slot
article.summary: The Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station will add USB ports, memory card readers, and an external SSD enclosure to your Mac mini while giving you a small '80s Macintosh on your desk.
article.title_zh: 必備迷你 Macintosh 復古擴展塢為您的 M4 Mac Mini 打造 1980 年代風格 — 配備 5 英寸 HD 顯示屏和 M.2 NVMe SSD 插槽
article.summary_zh: Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station 為 Mac mini 增添 USB 連接埠、記憶卡讀卡機和外部 SSD 外殼，同時在桌面上呈現懷舊的 80 年代 Macintosh 風貌。

article.title: Apple stops selling the M4 Mac Mini's 256GB storage model through its online store
article.summary: Apple launched the M4 chip-powered Mac Mini in 2024, with its base model having 256GB of storage. This model went out of stock on Apple's online store last month in some countries, including the US, and has now been removed from Apple's website worldwide. As a result, the new base storage for the M4 Mac Mini on Apple's website is 512GB, which costs $799 with the default 16GB RAM option. There are two more RAM options - 24GB and 32GB. If you want more storage, you can upgrade to 1TB or 2TB. If you upgrade to the M4 Pro chip, you can get the Mac Mini with up to 64GB RAM and up to 8TB...
article.title_zh: Apple 停止通過在線商店銷售 M4 Mac Mini 的 256GB 存儲模型
article.summary_zh: Apple 在 2024 年推出了搭載 M4 芯片的 Mac Mini，基礎型號配有 256GB 存儲。該型號上月在包括美國在內的部分國家的 Apple 在線商店缺貨，現已從 Apple 網站全球下架。

article.title: Popular 90s search engine ‘Ask Jeeves’ finally bites the dust — parent company shutters website that pioneered natural language queries, only a placeholder results page remains
article.summary: IAC, the parent company of Ask Jeeves, is finally putting the search engine out to pasture after 30 years.
article.title_zh: 熱門 90 年代搜尋引擎 'Ask Jeeves' 終於走向末路 — 母公司關閉這個開創自然語言查詢的網站，僅剩佔位符結果頁面
article.summary_zh: IAC 作為 Ask Jeeves 的母公司，在 30 年後終於停止營運這個搜尋引擎。

article.title: Keychain-size ‘GameCube’ uses genuine Nintendo silicon — system also includes a dock, design shared to GitHub
article.summary: Video showcases the Nintendo Kawaii project, in which modders have shrunken a boxy GameCube down to a keychain.
article.title_zh: 鑰匙圈大小的 'GameCube' 採用真正的任天堂矽晶 — 系統包括底座，設計已分享到 GitHub
article.summary_zh: 影片展示 Nintendo Kawaii 專案，其中 MOD 玩家已將方形 GameCube 縮小到鑰匙圈大小。

article.title: Why you need a digital spring cleaning (and how Incogni makes it effortless)
article.summary: As winter finally thaws and the weather warms up, we’re all tackling our annual spring cleaning routines. We declutter our closets and deep-clean our homes, yet we often overlook our digital lives. Personal information like your home address, phone number, date of birth, and financial history are all scattered across the internet. It’s actively being collected and sold by invisible data brokers. Spring is the time to take out the digital trash and reclaim your privacy with Incogni , and 9to5Mac readers can save 55% right now. more…
article.title_zh: 為什麼你需要進行數位春季大掃除（以及 Incogni 如何讓這變得輕而易舉）
article.summary_zh: 隨著冬天消退、天氣轉暖，我們都在進行年度春季清潔。但我們常常忽視數位生活，忘記清理個人資訊如住址、電話號碼、出生日期和財務歷史等敏感數據。
